pinnedRepositories.name: gitops-eks-infrastructure
pinnedRepositories.description: Declarative AWS EKS cluster deployment using Terraform, featuring automated ArgoCD application synchronizations, Helm deployments, and custom metrics collection.

pinnedRepositories.name: immutable-packer-terraform
pinnedRepositories.description: Packer automated AMI generation backed by Ansible roles, deployed dynamically using Terraform Auto-Scaling groups behind an Application Load Balancer.

pinnedRepositories.name: observability-alerting-mesh
pinnedRepositories.description: A plug-and-play local & cloud monitoring template integrating Prometheus scraper, Blackbox endpoint probes, Alertmanager channels, and Grafana graphs.

pinnedRepositories.name: kubernetes-security-playground
pinnedRepositories.description: A compilation of secure-by-default Kubernetes configurations, containing network policies, non-root pod setups, and PodSecurityStandards overrides.
